english: foot; part of an ancient form

etymology.description: и¶і(и¶і) (zГә, 'foot') + еӨё(еӨё) (kuДҒ, 'boast') = depict movement associated with a foot -> variant of и·Ё(и·Ё) (kuГ , 'stride')
etymology.interpretation: The character рЎ•’ is a variant form of и·Ё(и·Ё) (kuГ , 'stride'), which combines и¶і(и¶і) (zГә, 'foot') as the semantic component indicating its association with feet, and еӨё(еӨё) (kuДҒ, 'boast') as the phonetic component. This combination reflects the movement or action related to using one's feet.
